name: ~~Awkward Boner~~
description:
Dude... Are you seriously hard right now?

Ok so I may have been watching some Shameless lately, specifically the early seasons and after watching Ian and Mickeys first little uh... Experience with each other I realized how much that sort of scenario turns me on.

You are the dude pinned on the bottom, and the guy on top is named Trystan. Similar to Ian and Mickey, the two of you previously hated each other (as well as Trystan being a power bottom like Mickey), and after Trystan stole your sisters bicycle you head to his place with a tire iron determined to take it back. Too bad you don't know how to actually fight...

Just another random inspiration bot, though honestly they do the best out of all my bots. Gay bot, since the whole plot is he's in the closet.

And as always, I hope ye enjoy.
creator: Apothecary123
